revision.text:
'''金刀比羅本教'''（ことひらほんきょう）は、[[金刀比羅宮]]（[[香川県]][[仲多度郡]]）を総本部として[[昭和]]44年（[[1969年]]）[[8月5日]]宗教法人となった教団である。
== 概要 == 祭神は金刀比羅大神とし、[[教祖]]は第四代象頭山金毘羅大権現[[別当]]金光院主（象頭山松尾寺）の金剛坊宥盛（厳魂彦命として祀る）とする。中世・近世の金毘羅講を現代に継承し、[[明治維新]]以後の金刀比羅本宮崇敬講社・金刀比羅本宮崇敬講社を再組織して教団化することを宗旨とする。入信には[[改宗]]が必要とされる<ref>[http://www.rirc.or.jp/kyoudandb/modules/xwords/entry.php?entryID=205&categoryID=5 RIRC 宗教教団データベース - 教団データベース : : 金刀比羅本教]</ref>。
『ことひら』が定期刊行されている。
== 経典 == *金刀比羅本教教憲五条 *実践要旨20条 *[[古事記]] *[[日本書紀]]
== 金刀比羅本教教憲五条 == *自己の生命は遠い祖先の神々に連り、なお子々孫々に繋がる永遠且つ絶対であることを忘れないこと。<ref name=gojo>[http://www.konpira.or.jp/about/center/main/center.html 金刀比羅本教]</ref> *自分も神の分身であるから日々祓の修行を怠らないで心身共に清浄潔白を保つように勉めること。<ref name=gojo/> *不平を言ってはならない。神恩の感謝と歓びを以て一切を処理すること。<ref name=gojo/> *神人合一の境地に達する為には浄明、正直を旨としなければならない。<ref name=gojo/> *人は何れ高かれ低かれ神となるものであるから、高い神となるよう日々の修行を怠ってはならない。<ref name=gojo/>
== 脚注 == {{reflist|2}}
== 関連項目 == *[[金毘羅権現]]
==外部リンク== *[http://www.konpira.or.jp/about/center/main/center.html 金刀比羅本教]
{{新宗教}}

'''金刀比羅本教'''（ことひらほんきょう）は、[[金刀比羅宮]]（[[香川県]][[仲多度郡]]）を総本部として[[昭和]]44年（[[1969年]]）[[8月5日]]宗教法人となった教団である。
== 概要 == 祭神は金刀比羅大神とし、[[教祖]]は第四代象頭山金毘羅大権現[[別当]]金光院主（象頭山松尾寺）の金剛坊宥盛（厳魂彦命として祀る）とする。中世・近世の金毘羅講を現代に継承し、[[明治維新]]以後の金刀比羅本宮崇敬講社・金刀比羅本宮崇敬講社を再組織して教団化することを宗旨とする。入信には[[改宗]]が必要とされる<ref>[http://www.rirc.or.jp/kyoudandb/modules/xwords/entry.php?entryID=205&categoryID=5 RIRC 宗教教団データベース - 教団データベース : : 金刀比羅本教]</ref>。
『ことひら』が定期刊行されている。
== 経典 == *金刀比羅本教教憲五条 *実践要旨20条 *[[古事記]] *[[日本書紀]]
== 金刀比羅本教教憲五条 == *自己の生命は遠い祖先の神々に連り、なお子々孫々に繋がる永遠且つ絶対であることを忘れないこと。<ref name=gojo>[http://www.konpira.or.jp/about/center/main/center.html 金刀比羅本教]</ref> *自分も神の分身であるから日々祓の修行を怠らないで心身共に清浄潔白を保つように勉めること。<ref name=gojo/> *不平を言ってはならない。神恩の感謝と歓びを以て一切を処理すること。<ref name=gojo/> *神人合一の境地に達する為には浄明、正直を旨としなければならない。<ref name=gojo/> *人は何れ高かれ低かれ神となるものであるから、高い神となるよう日々の修行を怠ってはならない。<ref name=gojo/>
== 脚注 == {{reflist|2}}
== 関連項目 == *[[金毘羅権現]]
==外部リンク== *[http://www.konpira.or.jp/about/center/main/center.html 金刀比羅本教]
{{新宗教}}
{{DEFAULTSORT:ことひらほんきよう}} [[Category:神道の教派]]

== 金刀比羅本教教憲五条 == *自己の生命は遠い祖先の神々に連り、なお子々孫々に繋がる永遠且つ絶対であることを忘れないこと。<ref name=gojo>[http://www.konpira.or.jp/about/center/main/center.html 金刀比羅本教]</ref> *自分も神の分身であるから日々祓の修行を怠らないで心身共に清浄潔白を保つように勉めること。<ref name=gojo/> *不平を言ってはならない。神恩の感謝と歓びを以て一切を処理すること。<ref name=gojo/> *神人合一の境地に達する為には浄明、正直を旨としなければならない。<ref name=gojo/> *人は何れ高かれ低かれ神となるものであるから、高い神となるよう日々の修行を怠ってはならない。<ref name=gojo/>

== 関連項目 == *[[金毘羅権現]]
==外部リンク== *[http://www.konpira.or.jp/about/center/main/center.html 金刀比羅本教]

[[File:KonpiraHonkyou2010.jpg|thumb|right|金刀比羅本教総本部]] '''金刀比羅本教'''（ことひらほんきょう）は、[[金刀比羅宮]]（[[香川県]][[仲多度郡]]）を総本部として[[昭和]]44年（[[1969年]]）[[8月5日]]宗教法人となった教団である。

『ことひら』が定期刊行されている。
== 経典 == *金刀比羅本教教憲五条 *実践要旨20条 *[[古事記]] *[[日本書紀]]
== 金刀比羅本教教憲五条 == *自己の生命は遠い祖先の神々に連り、なお子々孫々に繋がる永遠且つ絶対であることを忘れないこと。<ref name=gojo>[http://www.konpira.or.jp/about/center/main/center.html 金刀比羅本教]</ref> *自分も神の分身であるから日々祓の修行を怠らないで心身共に清浄潔白を保つように勉めること。<ref name=gojo/> *不平を言ってはならない。神恩の感謝と歓びを以て一切を処理すること。<ref name=gojo/> *神人合一の境地に達する為には浄明、正直を旨としなければならない。<ref name=gojo/> *人は何れ高かれ低かれ神となるものであるから、高い神となるよう日々の修行を怠ってはならない。<ref name=gojo/>
== 脚注 == {{reflist|2}}

{{新宗教}}

revision.text:
[[File:KonpiraHonkyou2010.jpg|thumb|right|金刀比羅本教総本部]] '''金刀比羅本教'''（ことひらほんきょう）は、[[金刀比羅宮]]（[[香川県]][[仲多度郡]]）を総本部として[[昭和]]44年（[[1969年]]）[[8月5日]]に宗教法人となった教団である。
== 概要 == 祭神は'''金刀比羅大神'''とし、[[教祖]]は第四代象頭山金毘羅大権現[[別当]]金光院主（象頭山松尾寺）の金剛坊宥盛を'''厳魂彦命'''として祀る。中世・近世の金毘羅講を現代に継承し、[[明治維新]]以後の金刀比羅本宮崇敬講社・金刀比羅本宮崇敬講社を再組織して教団化することを宗旨とする。入信には[[改宗]]が必要とされる<ref>{{教団データベース2|o69}}</ref>。
『ことひら』が定期刊行されている。
== 経典 == *金刀比羅本教教憲五条 *実践要旨20条 *[[古事記]] *[[日本書紀]]
== 金刀比羅本教教憲五条 == *自己の生命は遠い祖先の神々に連り、なお子々孫々に繋がる永遠且つ絶対であることを忘れないこと。<ref name=gojo>[http://www.konpira.or.jp/about/center/main/center.html 金刀比羅本教]</ref> *自分も神の分身であるから日々祓の修行を怠らないで心身共に清浄潔白を保つように勉めること。<ref name=gojo/> *不平を言ってはならない。神恩の感謝と歓びを以て一切を処理すること。<ref name=gojo/> *神人合一の境地に達する為には浄明、正直を旨としなければならない。<ref name=gojo/> *人は何れ高かれ低かれ神となるものであるから、高い神となるよう日々の修行を怠ってはならない。<ref name=gojo/>
== 脚注 == {{reflist|2}}
== 関連項目 == *[[金毘羅権現]]
==外部リンク== *[http://www.konpira.or.jp/ 金刀比羅宮]
{{新宗教}}
{{DEFAULTSORT:ことひらほんきよう}} [[Category:神道の教派]] [[Category:金刀比羅宮]]

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[commons:Category:Kotohira-honkyo]][[ja:金刀比羅本教]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11646486]] Wikidata name: Kotohira Honkyō [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:40, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} [[File:KonpiraHonkyou2010.jpg|thumb|right|Headquarters of Kotohira Hongyō]] '''Kotohira Hongyō''' (金刀比羅本教) is a religious organization established as a religious corporation on {{ill|August 5, 1969|ja|昭和44th year 8月5日|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/August 5, 1969|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, with its headquarters at [[:en:Kotohira-gū|Kotohira-gū]] in [[:en:Nakatado District, Kagawa|Nakatado District, Kagawa]].
== Overview == The main deity worshipped is the '''Kotohira Great Deity''' (金刀比羅大神), and the organization reveres as its founder the fourth abbot of Mount Zōzu's Konpira Daigongen temple, Kongōbō Yūjō, who is deified as '''Iwasaka no Mikoto''' (厳魂彦命). The organization aims to modernize the {{ill|Konpira pilgrimage societies|ja|金毘羅講|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Konpira pilgrimage societies|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} from the medieval and early modern periods and to reorganize the faith groups and associations devoted to Kotohira since the [[:en:Meiji Restoration|Meiji Restoration]]. Conversion is required for membership<ref>{{教団データベース|177}}</ref>.
A regular publication titled *Kotohira* is issued by the organization.
== Scriptures == * The Five Articles of the Constitution of Kotohira Hongyō * 20 Articles of Practical Principles * [[:en:Kojiki|Kojiki]] * [[:en:Nihon Shoki|Nihon Shoki]]
== Five Articles of the Constitution of Kotohira Hongyō == * Never forget that one’s life is deeply connected to the divine ancestors of the past and will continue eternally through one’s descendants.<ref name=gojo>[http://www.konpira.or.jp/about/center/main/center.html Kotohira Hongyō]</ref> * Since one is also a manifestation of the divine, daily purification practices must be diligently performed to maintain purity and integrity of both mind and body.<ref name=gojo/> * Refrain from expressing discontent. Address all matters with gratitude and joy toward the divine blessings.<ref name=gojo/> * To achieve unity between humans and the divine, one must adhere to clarity, honesty, and righteousness.<ref name=gojo/> * All people are destined to become deities, and one must strive daily to become a greater deity.<ref name=gojo/>
== References == {{reflist|2}}
== Related Articles == * [[:en:Konpira Gongen|Konpira Gongen]]
== External Links == * [http://www.konpira.or.jp/ Kotohira Hongyō Official Website]
{{New religions in Japan}}
{{translated page|ja|金刀比羅本教|version=104323017|comment=Imported full ja history}}
{{draft categories|
[[Category:Completion tier 6]]
}}
[[ja:金刀比羅本教]]

== Overview == The main deity worshipped is the '''Kotohira Great Deity''' (金刀比羅大神), and the organization reveres as its founder the fourth abbot of Mount Zōzu's Konpira Daigongen temple, Kongōbō Yūjō, who is deified as '''Iwasaka no Mikoto''' (厳魂彦命). The organization aims to modernize the {{ill|Konpira pilgrimage societies|ja|金毘羅講|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Konpira pilgrimage societies|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} from the medieval and early modern periods and to reorganize the faith groups and associations devoted to Kotohira since the [[:en:Meiji Restoration|Meiji Restoration]]. Conversion is required for membership<ref>{{教団データベース|177}}</ref>.
A regular publication titled *Kotohira* is issued by the organization.
== Scriptures == * The Five Articles of the Constitution of Kotohira Hongyō * 20 Articles of Practical Principles * [[:en:Kojiki|Kojiki]] * [[:en:Nihon Shoki|Nihon Shoki]]
== Five Articles of the Constitution of Kotohira Hongyō == * Never forget that one’s life is deeply connected to the divine ancestors of the past and will continue eternally through one’s descendants.<ref name=gojo>[http://www.konpira.or.jp/about/center/main/center.html Kotohira Hongyō]</ref> * Since one is also a manifestation of the divine, daily purification practices must be diligently performed to maintain purity and integrity of both mind and body.<ref name=gojo/> * Refrain from expressing discontent. Address all matters with gratitude and joy toward the divine blessings.<ref name=gojo/> * To achieve unity between humans and the divine, one must adhere to clarity, honesty, and righteousness.<ref name=gojo/> * All people are destined to become deities, and one must strive daily to become a greater deity.<ref name=gojo/>
== References == {{reflist|2}}
== Related Articles == * [[:en:Konpira Gongen|Konpira Gongen]]
== External Links == * [http://www.konpira.or.jp/ Kotohira Hongyō Official Website]

== Five Articles of the Constitution of Kotohira Hongyō == * Never forget that one’s life is deeply connected to the divine ancestors of the past and will continue eternally through one’s descendants.<ref name=gojo>[http://www.konpira.or.jp/about/center/main/center.html Kotohira Hongyō]</ref> * Since one is also a manifestation of the divine, daily purification practices must be diligently performed to maintain purity and integrity of both mind and body.<ref name=gojo/> * Refrain from expressing discontent. Address all matters with gratitude and joy toward the divine blessings.<ref name=gojo/> * To achieve unity between humans and the divine, one must adhere to clarity, honesty, and righteousness.<ref name=gojo/> * All people are destined to become deities, and one must strive daily to become a greater deity.<ref name=gojo/>
== References == {{reflist|2}}
== Related Articles == * [[:en:Konpira Gongen|Konpira Gongen]]
== External Links == * [http://www.konpira.or.jp/ Kotohira Hongyō Official Website]
{{New religions in Japan}}
{{translated page|ja|金刀比羅本教|version=104323017|comment=Imported full ja history}}

[[Category:Completion tier 6]]
}}

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[sn:commons:Category:Kotohira-honkyo]][[ja:金刀比羅本教]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11646486]] Wikidata name: Kotohira Honkyō [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:40, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} [[File:KonpiraHonkyou2010.jpg|thumb|right|Headquarters of Kotohira Hongyō]] '''Kotohira Hongyō''' (金刀比羅本教) is a religious organization established as a religious corporation on {{ill|August 5, 1969|ja|昭和44th year 8月5日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/August 5, 1969|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, with its headquarters at [[:en:Kotohira-gū|Kotohira-gū]] in [[:en:Nakatado District, Kagawa|Nakatado District, Kagawa]].
== Overview == The main deity worshipped is the '''Kotohira Great Deity''' (金刀比羅大神), and the organization reveres as its founder the fourth abbot of Mount Zōzu's Konpira Daigongen temple, Kongōbō Yūjō, who is deified as '''Iwasaka no Mikoto''' (厳魂彦命). The organization aims to modernize the {{ill|Konpira pilgrimage societies|ja|金毘羅講|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Konpira pilgrimage societies|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} from the medieval and early modern periods and to reorganize the faith groups and associations devoted to Kotohira since the [[:en:Meiji Restoration|Meiji Restoration]]. Conversion is required for membership<ref>{{教団データベース|177}}</ref>.
A regular publication titled *Kotohira* is issued by the organization.
== Scriptures == * The Five Articles of the Constitution of Kotohira Hongyō * 20 Articles of Practical Principles * [[:en:Kojiki|Kojiki]] * [[:en:Nihon Shoki|Nihon Shoki]]
== Five Articles of the Constitution of Kotohira Hongyō == * Never forget that one’s life is deeply connected to the divine ancestors of the past and will continue eternally through one’s descendants.<ref name=gojo>[http://www.konpira.or.jp/about/center/main/center.html Kotohira Hongyō]</ref> * Since one is also a manifestation of the divine, daily purification practices must be diligently performed to maintain purity and integrity of both mind and body.<ref name=gojo/> * Refrain from expressing discontent. Address all matters with gratitude and joy toward the divine blessings.<ref name=gojo/> * To achieve unity between humans and the divine, one must adhere to clarity, honesty, and righteousness.<ref name=gojo/> * All people are destined to become deities, and one must strive daily to become a greater deity.<ref name=gojo/>
== References == {{reflist|2}}
== Related Articles == * [[:en:Konpira Gongen|Konpira Gongen]]
== External Links == * [http://www.konpira.or.jp/ Kotohira Hongyō Official Website]
{{New religions in Japan}}
{{translated page|ja|金刀比羅本教|version=104323017|comment=Imported full ja history}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[commons:Category:Kotohira-honkyo]][[ja:金刀比羅本教]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[commons:Category:Kotohira-honkyo]][[ja:金刀比羅本教]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[sn:commons:Category:Kotohira-honkyo]][[ja:金刀比羅本教]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11646486]] Wikidata name: Kotohira Honkyō [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:40, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} [[File:KonpiraHonkyou2010.jpg|thumb|right|Headquarters of Kotohira Hongyō]] '''Kotohira Hongyō''' (金刀比羅本教) is a religious organization established as a religious corporation on {{ill|August 5, 1969|ja|昭和44th year 8月5日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/August 5, 1969|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, with its headquarters at [[:en:Kotohira-gū|Kotohira-gū]] in [[:en:Nakatado District, Kagawa|Nakatado District, Kagawa]].
== Overview == The main deity worshipped is the '''Kotohira Great Deity''' (金刀比羅大神), and the organization reveres as its founder the fourth abbot of Mount Zōzu's Konpira Daigongen temple, Kongōbō Yūjō, who is deified as '''Iwasaka no Mikoto''' (厳魂彦命). The organization aims to modernize the {{ill|Konpira pilgrimage societies|ja|金毘羅講|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Konpira pilgrimage societies|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} from the medieval and early modern periods and to reorganize the faith groups and associations devoted to Kotohira since the [[:en:Meiji Restoration|Meiji Restoration]]. Conversion is required for membership<ref>{{教団データベース|177}}</ref>.
A regular publication titled *Kotohira* is issued by the organization.
== Scriptures == * The Five Articles of the Constitution of Kotohira Hongyō * 20 Articles of Practical Principles * [[:en:Kojiki|Kojiki]] * [[:en:Nihon Shoki|Nihon Shoki]]
== Five Articles of the Constitution of Kotohira Hongyō == * Never forget that one’s life is deeply connected to the divine ancestors of the past and will continue eternally through one’s descendants.<ref name=gojo>[http://www.konpira.or.jp/about/center/main/center.html Kotohira Hongyō]</ref> * Since one is also a manifestation of the divine, daily purification practices must be diligently performed to maintain purity and integrity of both mind and body.<ref name=gojo/> * Refrain from expressing discontent. Address all matters with gratitude and joy toward the divine blessings.<ref name=gojo/> * To achieve unity between humans and the divine, one must adhere to clarity, honesty, and righteousness.<ref name=gojo/> * All people are destined to become deities, and one must strive daily to become a greater deity.<ref name=gojo/>
== References == {{reflist|2}}
== Related Articles == * [[:en:Konpira Gongen|Konpira Gongen]]
== External Links == * [http://www.konpira.or.jp/ Kotohira Hongyō Official Website]
{{New religions in Japan}}
{{translated page|ja|金刀比羅本教|version=104323017|comment=Imported full ja history}}
{{draft categories| }}

Conversion is required for membership<ref>{{教団データベース|177}}</ref>.

== Five Articles of the Constitution of Kotohira Hongyō == * Never forget that one’s life is deeply connected to the divine ancestors of the past and will continue eternally through one’s descendants.<ref name=gojo>[http://www.konpira.or.jp/about/center/main/center.html Kotohira Hongyō]</ref> * Since one is also a manifestation of the divine, daily purification practices must be diligently performed to maintain purity and integrity of both mind and body.<ref name=gojo/> * Refrain from expressing discontent. Address all matters with gratitude and joy toward the divine blessings.<ref name=gojo/> * To achieve unity between humans and the divine, one must adhere to clarity, honesty, and righteousness.<ref name=gojo/> * All people are destined to become deities, and one must strive daily to become a greater deity.<ref name=gojo/>

[[File:KonpiraHonkyou2010.jpg|thumb|right|Headquarters of Kotohira Hongyō]] '''Kotohira Hongyō''' (金刀比羅本教) is a religious organization established as a religious corporation on {{ill|August 5, 1969|ja|昭和44th year 8月5日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/August 5, 1969|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, with its headquarters at {{ill|Kotohira-gū|en|Kotohira-gū|WD=Q94760|lt=Kotohira-gū}} in {{ill|Nakatado District, Kagawa|en|Nakatado District, Kagawa|WD=Q1206155|lt=Nakatado District, Kagawa}}.
== Overview == The main deity worshipped is the '''Kotohira Great Deity''' (金刀比羅大神), and the organization reveres as its founder the fourth abbot of Mount Zōzu's Konpira Daigongen temple, Kongōbō Yūjō, who is deified as '''Iwasaka no Mikoto''' (厳魂彦命). The organization aims to modernize the {{ill|Konpira pilgrimage societies|ja|金毘羅講|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Konpira pilgrimage societies|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} from the medieval and early modern periods and to reorganize the faith groups and associations devoted to Kotohira since the {{ill|Meiji Restoration|en|Meiji Restoration|WD=Q8707|lt=Meiji Restoration}}. Conversion is required for membership<ref>{{教団データベース|177}}</ref>.
A regular publication titled *Kotohira* is issued by the organization.
== Scriptures == * The Five Articles of the Constitution of Kotohira Hongyō * 20 Articles of Practical Principles * {{ill|Kojiki|en|Kojiki|WD=Q813031|lt=Kojiki}} * {{ill|Nihon Shoki|en|Nihon Shoki|WD=Q813935|lt=Nihon Shoki}}
== Five Articles of the Constitution of Kotohira Hongyō == * Never forget that one’s life is deeply connected to the divine ancestors of the past and will continue eternally through one’s descendants.<ref name=gojo>[http://www.konpira.or.jp/about/center/main/center.html Kotohira Hongyō]</ref> * Since one is also a manifestation of the divine, daily purification practices must be diligently performed to maintain purity and integrity of both mind and body.<ref name=gojo/> * Refrain from expressing discontent. Address all matters with gratitude and joy toward the divine blessings.<ref name=gojo/> * To achieve unity between humans and the divine, one must adhere to clarity, honesty, and righteousness.<ref name=gojo/> * All people are destined to become deities, and one must strive daily to become a greater deity.<ref name=gojo/>
== References == {{reflist|2}}
== Related Articles == * {{ill|Konpira Gongen|en|Konpira Gongen|WD=Q167077|lt=Konpira Gongen}}
== External Links == * [http://www.konpira.or.jp/ Kotohira Hongyō Official Website]
{{New religions in Japan}}
{{translated page|ja|金刀比羅本教|version=104323017|comment=Imported full ja history}}
[[ja:金刀比羅本教]]

[[File:KonpiraHonkyou2010.jpg|thumb|right|Headquarters of Kotohira Hongyō]] '''Kotohira Hongyō''' (金刀比羅本教) is a religious organization established as a religious corporation on {{ill|August 5, 1969|ja|昭和44th year 8月5日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/August 5, 1969|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, with its headquarters at {{ill|Kotohira-gū|en|Kotohira-gū|qid=Q94760|lt=Kotohira-gū|1=Kotohira-gū}} in {{ill|Nakatado District, Kagawa|en|Nakatado District, Kagawa|qid=Q1206155|lt=Nakatado District, Kagawa|1=Nakatado District, Kagawa}}.
== Overview == The main deity worshipped is the '''Kotohira Great Deity''' (金刀比羅大神), and the organization reveres as its founder the fourth abbot of Mount Zōzu's Konpira Daigongen temple, Kongōbō Yūjō, who is deified as '''Iwasaka no Mikoto''' (厳魂彦命). The organization aims to modernize the {{ill|Konpira pilgrimage societies|ja|金毘羅講|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Konpira pilgrimage societies|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} from the medieval and early modern periods and to reorganize the faith groups and associations devoted to Kotohira since the {{ill|Meiji Restoration|en|Meiji Restoration|qid=Q8707|lt=Meiji Restoration|1=Meiji Restoration}}. Conversion is required for membership<ref>{{教団データベース|177}}</ref>.
A regular publication titled *Kotohira* is issued by the organization.
== Scriptures == * The Five Articles of the Constitution of Kotohira Hongyō * 20 Articles of Practical Principles * {{ill|Kojiki|en|Kojiki|qid=Q813031|lt=Kojiki|1=Kojiki}} * {{ill|Nihon Shoki|en|Nihon Shoki|qid=Q813935|lt=Nihon Shoki|1=Nihon Shoki}}
== Five Articles of the Constitution of Kotohira Hongyō == * Never forget that one’s life is deeply connected to the divine ancestors of the past and will continue eternally through one’s descendants.<ref name=gojo>[http://www.konpira.or.jp/about/center/main/center.html Kotohira Hongyō]</ref> * Since one is also a manifestation of the divine, daily purification practices must be diligently performed to maintain purity and integrity of both mind and body.<ref name=gojo/> * Refrain from expressing discontent. Address all matters with gratitude and joy toward the divine blessings.<ref name=gojo/> * To achieve unity between humans and the divine, one must adhere to clarity, honesty, and righteousness.<ref name=gojo/> * All people are destined to become deities, and one must strive daily to become a greater deity.<ref name=gojo/>
== References == {{reflist|2}}
== Related Articles == * {{ill|Konpira Gongen|en|Konpira Gongen|qid=Q167077|lt=Konpira Gongen|1=Konpira Gongen}}
== External Links == * [http://www.konpira.or.jp/ Kotohira Hongyō Official Website]
{{New religions in Japan}}
{{translated page|ja|金刀比羅本教|version=104323017|comment=Imported full ja history}}
[[ja:金刀比羅本教]]
